parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an email classifier for USA Gummies, a CPG gummy supplement company. Classify the email and respond with ONLY valid JSON matching this schema: { "category": one of ["production","sales","finance","retail","marketplace","regulatory","customer","compliance","noise"], "secondary_categories": array of strings from same list, "priority": one of ["critical","important","informational","noise"], "classification_confidence": one of ["high","medium","low"], "summary": string (max 200 chars), "action_required": boolean, "suggested_action": string or null, "needs_human_review": boolean, "approval_trigger": one of ["distributor_response","payment_issue","production_decision","external_response_draft","commitment"] or null, "routed_agent_names": array of agent names relevant to this email }' }, { role: 'user', content: 'From: ' + ($json.sender_name || '') + ' <' + ($json.sender_email || '') + '>
Subject: ' + ($json.subject || '') + '
Date: ' + ($json.received_at || '') + '

' + (($json.raw_text || '').substring(0, 8000)) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status, category: $json.category || null, secondary_categories: $json.secondary_categories || [], priority: $json.priority || null, classification_confidence: $json.classification_confidence ?? null, summary: ($json.summary || '').substring(0, 500), action_required: $json.action_required || false, suggested_action: $json.suggested_action || null, needs_human_review: $json.needs_human_review || false, classifying_worker_id: null, classification_started_at: null, classifier_error: $json.classifier_error || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '[ALERTS] :rotating_light: REGULATORY EMAIL DETECTED
From: ' + ($('Validate & Route').item.json.sender_email || 'unknown') + '
Subject: ' + ($('Validate & Route').item.json.subject || 'N/A') + '
Summary: ' + ($('Validate & Route').item.json.summary || 'N/A') + '
Priority: ' + ($('Validate & Route').item.json.priority || 'unknown') }) }}
